docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-02-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-21-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORP) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATSUNAMI, MAKI AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATSUNAMI, MAKI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT PLAINTIFF'S LOSS WAS CAUSED BY ANY ACT OR OMISSION ON THE PART OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-05-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MAKI MATSUNAMI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBTS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
